description: Stable unique identifier for the position.
Portfolio valuation date.
Mock manager or sleeve owner.
Portfolio book or sleeve.
Investment strategy bucket.
High-level asset class such as Equity Commodity or Option.
Instrument form such as Cash Equity Futures or Index Call Option.
Readable instrument name.
Trading ticker contract code or OTC description.
ISIN where available; otherwise an internal or venue identifier.
Instrument valuation currency.
Position quantity; negative values indicate shorts.
Latest local price or premium.
Market value in the instrument currency.
Market value translated to EUR.
Derivative maturity date where relevant.
Call or Put for option positions.
Option strike where relevant.
Option delta where relevant.
Option gamma where relevant.
Option vega where relevant.
Main market risk factor matching a downloaded time-series column when possible.
FX risk factor used for non-EUR instruments.
Interest-rate or discount-rate risk factor.
Volatility risk factor for option positions.
Free-form mapping and modelling notes.
Position identifier joined to positions.position_id.
Risk factor name.
Type of risk factor.
Local source file containing the time series or snapshot.
Exposure basis such as market_value_eur delta_adjusted_eur vega_eur or notional_eur.
EUR exposure amount for aggregation and reporting.
Beta sensitivity or scalar used to convert position exposure into factor exposure.
How the risk factor was assigned.
Active Proxy or Placeholder.
Free-form mapping notes.
Stable unique identifier for the balance-sheet line.
Mock balance-sheet reporting date.
Illustrative bank name; not actual reported Deutsche Bank data.
Bank division or treasury unit that owns the balance-sheet line.
Product desk or balance-sheet product family.
Asset Liability or Equity.
High-level balance-sheet bucket such as Loans Customer Deposits or Wholesale Funding.
Instrument or product type.
Original balance currency.
Book balance in millions of original currency.
Book balance translated to EUR millions.
Customer or contractual rate in percent where applicable.
Fixed Floating Administered Capital Variable or Non-interest Bearing.
Reference index such as EURIBOR 3M ESTR ON SOFR 3M or None.
Current rate reset tenor used for interest-rate sensitivity.
Contractual original maturity or Open.
